title: NCERT textbook controversy: Blacklisted experts move Supreme Court against order criticising them
description: The three experts, Professor Michel Danino, Suparna Diwakar, and Alok Prasanna Kumar, who were recently censured by the Supreme Court for the contents of a school textbook chapter they drafted on judiciary, have moved the top court against observations made against them.The Court had taken a suo motu congnizance of the Class VIII textbook published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) and said its contents demeaned the dignity of the judiciary.The school education
